description.text: Rilevamento automatico di siti truffa e phishing. In linguaggio semplice, per tutti.

status_warning_subtitle.text: $N$ link in questa pagina meritano un controllo più attento

status_danger_subtitle.text: $DOMAIN$ si finge un altro sito per rubare i tuoi dati

onboarding_tip.text: Controllo ogni link su ogni pagina. Quelli pericolosi li segno in rosso. In dubbio? Tasto destro → «Verifica con Cleanway».

aha_found_scams.text: Ho trovato $N$ link truffa che il tuo browser si era perso

recent_empty.text: Niente ancora — naviga tranquillo, ti sto guardando.

trust_footer.text: I tuoi dati non lasciano mai questo dispositivo

explanation.text: $DOMAIN$ si finge un altro sito per rubare i tuoi dati.

scheme_heading.text: Come i truffatori usano questi siti:

scheme_step1.text: Ti chiederanno la password o i dati bancari

scheme_step2.text: Il truffatore ruba tutto ciò che scrivi

scheme_step3.text: Svuotano il tuo conto o rubano la tua identità

trust_footer.text: Protetto da Cleanway. I tuoi dati restano sul tuo dispositivo.

hero_subtitle.text: Ogni link che vedi viene controllato. Quelli pericolosi sono bloccati in automatico.

step1_desc.text: Ogni pagina, ogni link. Etichetta verde: sicuro. Rossa: truffa.

step2_title.text: I tuoi dati restano con te

step2_desc.text: Controlliamo solo i nomi dei siti. La tua cronologia non lascia mai questo dispositivo.

step3_desc.text: La maggior parte dei controlli avviene sul tuo dispositivo in meno di un secondo.

step4_desc.text: Proteggi genitori, figli, nonni con un solo piano. Modalità diverse per ciascuno.

cta_scan.text: Controlla la mia casella per truffe nascoste

trust_footer.text: Il blocco è gratis per sempre. I tuoi dati non lasciano mai questo dispositivo.

hero.subtitle: Controllo automatico dei link su ogni pagina. 9 fonti di minacce. Rilevamento con IA. I tuoi dati di navigazione non lasciano mai il tuo dispositivo.
hero.cta_footer: Protezione base gratuita per sempre. Senza carta.

footer.tagline: I tuoi dati, il tuo dispositivo.

features.heading: Everything you need. Nothing you don't.

items.title: Automatic Link Scanning
items.desc: Every link on every page checked against 9 threat databases. Red, yellow, green badges show safety at a glance.

items.title: Privacy Audit
items.desc: Right-click any page to see trackers, cookies, data collection, and fingerprinting. Grade A through F.

items.title: ML-Powered Detection
items.desc: CatBoost model trained on 18K+ domains. 0.9988 AUC. Catches novel phishing that rule-based systems miss.

items.title: Instant Protection
items.desc: 95% of checks happen locally via bloom filter in under 1ms. No slowdown. No waiting.

items.title: Your Data, Your Device
items.desc: Browsing history never touches our servers. We only see domain names. Even if breached, your data is safe.

items.title: Inbox Scanner
items.desc: Finds phishing links in your Gmail and Outlook that your browser missed.

steps.title: Install
steps.desc: Add the Chrome extension. Takes 10 seconds.

steps.title: Browse
steps.desc: Cleanway checks every link automatically. No action needed.

steps.title: Stay Safe
steps.desc: Dangerous links get red badges. Click for details.

pricing_teaser.heading: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing_teaser.trial_note: All plans include 14-day free trial. Cancel anytime.

privacy.heading: Privacy is not a feature. It's the architecture.
privacy.server_note: If breached: attacker gets emails + subscription. Boring.
privacy.device_note: If device is lost: protected by OS encryption.

items.q: Finally, a security tool that doesn't spy on me. The Privacy Audit is eye-opening.
Caught 3 phishing links in my Gmail that Chrome missed. Worth every penny.
We replaced KnowBe4 with Cleanway Business. Same protection, 1/4 the price.

items.a: Your browsing history never leaves your device. Our servers store only your email and subscription status. Even if we're breached, attackers learn nothing about your online activity.
No. 95% of checks happen locally via bloom filter in under 1ms. Only unknown domains are sent to our API (domain name only, never full URLs).

items.q: Can I use it with a VPN?
items.a: Yes! On mobile, Cleanway auto-detects your VPN and switches to DNS mode, working alongside NordVPN, ExpressVPN, or any other provider.

items.q: What's different from Google Safe Browsing?
items.a: Google Safe Browsing is reactive — it catches known threats but misses new phishing. Cleanway adds ML detection, 8 additional threat sources, Privacy Audit, and doesn't send your browsing data to Google.
Yes! The free plan includes 10 API checks/day, unlimited local bloom filter checks, and basic Privacy Audit. Most casual users never need to upgrade.
Business plan includes simulated phishing emails sent to your team. Pick a template, we send test emails, track who clicks vs. who reports. For training, not punishment.

trust_footer.text: Cleanway · Protection that stays on your device

footer_legal.text: You received this email because you have a Cleanway account.

subject.text: Welcome to Cleanway — you're protected now

preheader.text: Every link you see is being checked, automatically.

body_p1.text: We'll quietly check every link you encounter. The dangerous ones get a red mark — you'll see them before clicking. That's it.

body_p2.text: Your browsing data never leaves your device. We only check domain names, and your history is yours alone.

cta_scan.text: Scan my inbox for hidden scams

list_item_1.text: Automatic link checking on every page you visit

list_item_2.text: Block dangerous sites before they steal your data

list_item_3.text: Works across Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and your phone

list_item_4.text: Your data stays on your device — always

body_p1.text: Thanks for supporting Cleanway. Your subscription is active.

preheader.text: See what we blocked this week.

title.text: This week, Cleanway protected you from:

body_p1.text: Here's what happened on your devices in the past 7 days.

percentile_body.text: You're safer than $PCT$% of Cleanway users this week.

subject.text: $NAME$ invited you to join their Cleanway family

preheader.text: Free protection on your devices, set up in 30 seconds.

title.text: You've been invited to Cleanway Family

body_p1.text: $NAME$ added you to their Cleanway family plan. You get the same protection on up to 2 of your devices — for free.

body_p2_security.text: This invitation is for you only — it expires in 72 hours. Your family admin can't see what you browse; only alerts when something dangerous is blocked on your device.

subject.text: Your email was found in a data breach

preheader.text: Change your password on affected sites soon.

title.text: Your email appeared in a new breach

body_p1.text: Your email was found in a recently disclosed data breach. This means your password on the affected site may be exposed.

body_p2_recommendation.text: Change your password on that site now. If you use the same password elsewhere, change it there too. Consider a password manager — it's the only real fix.

title.text: We'll be here if you come back

body_p1.text: Your subscription has been canceled. Blocking scam sites continues to work for free — this is our ethical invariant, it won't change.

body_p2_keep_free.text: You'll keep your free-tier features: link scanning, block pages, email leak checks, and basic Privacy Audit grades.

subject.text: $NAME$ set up Cleanway protection for you

preheader.text: Simple protection from scams — set up by your family.

title.text: Safety from online scams — set up for you

body_p1_to_grandchild.text: $NAME$ set up Cleanway protection on your devices with extra-large text and voice alerts. You don't need to do anything — it's already working.

body_p2_what_it_does.text: When a scammer tries to trick you with a fake bank website or delivery notice, Cleanway stops it before you enter anything. A clear warning shows in big letters: 'STOP — this is a scam site'.

reassurance.text: If you're not sure what to do, tap the 'Ask family' button in the app — $NAME$ gets a message and can help.
